ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c,'')), OR(
AND( OR(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'SDA_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Canaccede_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Fidem_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'SPL_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Scotia_Bank_Insolvency_Account'),
OR(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c ,'MW'), ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c, 'MS'), ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c, 'FNS'), ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c, 'REG'), ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c,'WMC')) ),
AND(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Fairstone_Insolvency_Account', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c,'MC')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c ,'MW')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c, 'MS')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c, 'FNS')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c, 'REG')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c,'WMC')) ), AND(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Goeasy_Insolvency_Account', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c,'UPL')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c ,'SL')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Code__c, 'LP')))
) )
